section_title: In the absence of any contract to the contrary, the bailee is bound to
content:
163. In the absence of any contract to the contrary, the bailee is bound to
entitled to
deliver to the bailor, or according to his directions, any increase or profit
increase or
profit from which may have accrued from the goods bailed.
goods
Illustration
bailed
A leaves a cow in the custody of B to be taken care of. The cow has a calf. B
is bound to deliver the calf as well as the cow to A.
Bailor's
